message:
feat(store): complete audit trail system with Auditable trait (bd-15a)

Adds the Auditable trait for uniform audit event creation from any
actionable type. Downstream crates (vc_collect, vc_guardian) can
implement this trait to emit audit events.

Also adds comprehensive test coverage:
- test_audit_event_all_types: verifies all 4 event types
- test_audit_event_all_results: verifies all 3 result types
- test_audit_event_get_by_id: tests single event fetch + missing ID
- test_audit_event_limit: tests limit behavior including default
- test_audit_event_type_roundtrip: FromStr/as_str for all types
- test_audit_result_roundtrip: FromStr/as_str for all results
- test_auditable_trait: verifies the trait works end-to-end

Closes bd-15a. Unblocks: bd-1ly, bd-2br, bd-3e2.3, bd-new.1,
bd-new.12, bd-new.15.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
